title: pyrrocoma lanceolata var. lanceolata
intro: Pyrrocoma lanceolata var. lanceolata, also known as Rocky Mountain goldenrod, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Pyrrocoma lanceolata var. lanceolata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and even treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
